title: Limbdi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Limbdi with a Z-Score of +6.63. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Limbdi are extremely hot and dry, with a humidity level of 24% and a wind speed of 8.6 km/h.
 The heat wave has resulted in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 22.2 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy demand for cooling.
 The city's infrastructure and residents are likely to be severely impacted by this extreme weather event, with potential disruptions to daily life and economic activities.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Limbdi.
